name: Demo: Rx Demo K3s Undeploy
description: Remove rx-demo demo workloads from k3s, clear the demo Grafana/Prometheus/Loki/Tempo stack, and verify the registry plus host telemetry remain ready for another take.
notes: Use before or after recording as a visible cleanup pipeline. It removes the rx-demo app namespace and demo observability deployments while preserving the local registry and k3s host telemetry DaemonSets.
